name: First Class Limousine
recent_news: No M&A or growth news found. Company appears to be a very small Costa Mesa, CA limousine operator; no confirmed school-bus or district contracts surfaced in public search.
fit_notes: Marginal tuck-in fit: ~9 employees, limousine-branded, no confirmed yellow-bus or district contracts. Below Summit's typical scale; likely not a school-bus operator.

name: Kastone Mobility Svc LLC
recent_news: Founder-operated patient/NEMT transport business in Brooklyn Park, MN; profiled in Star Tribune as a Kenyan-American small business. USDOT 2472735. No school district contracts or M&A activity identified.
fit_notes: Not a school-bus operator: NEMT/patient transport van service. Sub-scale (7 employees) and outside Summit's yellow-bus/SPED routed-service focus. Skip.

name: We Care Transportation Inc
recent_news: Multiple unrelated 'We Care Transportation' entities exist in MN/WI. Mound, MN PO Box entity (USDOT 2420920 / Montrose, MN) appears to be a small NEMT carrier; no school-bus or district contracts surfaced.
fit_notes: Likely NEMT/medical transport rather than student transportation; sub-scale (8 employees, ~$571K rev). Not an attractive Summit tuck-in target.

name: Inter American Limousine Svc
recent_news: Hudson County, NJ limo/taxi/car service operating on Bergenline Ave since ~2000. No school district contracts, special-needs routes, or M&A activity identified.
fit_notes: Not a student-transportation operator: livery/taxi/limo service. No SPED or yellow-bus footprint surfaced. Not a Summit tuck-in fit.

name: A & C Transportation
recent_news: Very small Lynwood, IL transportation operator; no website, no surfaced district contracts. Lynwood-area school-bus market is dominated by Kickert / Cook-Illinois Corp. No M&A/news identified.
fit_notes: Sub-scale (8 employees, ~$528K rev); possibly SPED van service in S. Cook County. Too small to move the needle for Summit; Lynwood market already served by Kickert/Cook-Illinois.
